summary: Comprehensive testing of UX improvements completed. All 19 requested features verified working. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features working correctly with proper colors and styling.

integration_issues.issue: Hydration warnings: <span> cannot be child of <tbody>, <tr>, <select>, <option> - existing issue from Emergent visual editor wrapper spans
integration_issues.note: This is a known Emergent platform issue with visual editor wrapper spans, not a code bug

passed_tests: Option chain banner prominently shows current symbol (NIFTY) in large bold text (28px, font-weight 800)
Option chain banner shows current expiry in a blue badge (rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1) background, blue text)
Option chain banner shows spot price (e.g., 'Spot 23,416.55')
Option chain dropdowns have labels (UNDERLYING, EXPIRY, STRIKES)
CALLS (CE) header is GREEN color (rgb(34, 197, 94))
PUTS (PE) header is RED color (rgb(239, 68, 68))
CE LTP values display in green color (rgb(34, 197, 94))
PE LTP values display in red color (rgb(239, 68, 68))
ITM CE cells have green tint background (rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.04))
ITM PE cells have red tint background (rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.04))
Dashboard arbitrage section shows full-width side-by-side NSE vs BSE prices
Each arbitrage card shows BUY/SELL labels on the correct exchange
BUY exchange box has green-tinted border (rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.25))
SELL exchange box has red-tinted border (rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.25))
Cost breakdown shows: Gross Spread, Txn Cost, Slippage (0.02%), Net Profit/Share
Net Profit is green when positive (rgb(34, 197, 94))
Backend /api/arbitrage/cross-exchange response includes txn_cost, slippage, slippage_pct fields
Summary bar: Call OI in green (rgb(74, 222, 128)), Put OI in red (rgb(248, 113, 113))
Auto-refresh toggle works ('Auto 5s' displayed)
Mobile responsive layout works (sidebar toggle, horizontal scroll on tables)
critical_code_review_comments: CSS classes properly implemented: oc-header-calls (green), oc-header-puts (red), oc-ltp-ce (green), oc-ltp-pe (red)
Arbitrage API correctly calculates and returns txn_cost, slippage (0.02%), and net_profit_per_share
Side-by-side arbitrage cards use arb-buy (green border) and arb-sell (red border) classes
Cost breakdown grid uses 4-column layout with proper labels
Banner symbol uses 28px font-size with font-weight 800 for prominence
Expiry badge uses blue background (rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1)) with blue text
test_credentials: No credentials required - public platform with Angel One broker pre-connected
context_for_next_testing_agent: Angel One broker is connected and live. Market is in post-market session. All UX improvements verified: (1) Option chain banner shows symbol in large bold text with blue expiry badge, (2) CE=green and PE=red colors throughout option chain, (3) Side-by-side arbitrage cards with BUY/SELL labels and green/red borders, (4) Cost breakdown with Gross Spread, Txn Cost, Slippage (0.02%), Net Profit/Share. The hydration warnings are from Emergent visual editor wrapper spans, not code bugs.

Dashboard Arbitrage Cards.BUY/SELL labels: PASS - Correct labels on each exchange

Cost Breakdown.Net Profit/Share: PASS - Green when positive, red when negative

Mobile Responsive.Horizontal scroll: PASS - overflow-x: auto on table container
